data.title: Broadcom, Marvell Set To Lead In 2025 As Sector Is 'At The Cusp Of A Semiconductor Up-Cycle,' Says Analyst
data.description: JPMorgan analyst Harlan Sur predicts a semiconductor up-cycle, with Broadcom and Marvell leading the charge and poised for growth in cloud and AI.

data.title: Schlumberger Q3 Earnings: Mixed Results As Middle East Shines And Latin America Falters
data.description: SLB reports mixed Q3 results with 10.2% revenue growth, adjusted EPS up 14%, and increased revenue in international and digital divisions.

data.title: Nvidia Executive Defends Tesla's 'Optimus' Robots Amid Criticism: 'That's A Huge Advancement...Not Something That Should Be Downplayed'
data.description: Reports from the "We Robot" event indicated that the humanoid robots were operated by engineers, sparking criticism over the authenticity of their capabilities.

data.title: Procter & Gamble Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
As US Tackles Inflation With Rate Cuts, IMF MD Sounds Alarm: 'Not Yet Time To Celebrate' Amid Looming Low Growth, High Debt
data.description: She praised central banks for their inflation control efforts but noted uneven benefits across regions, with some still facing high prices and related unrest
